The surface energy of one small drop is: Esmall = 4π(r′)2σ = 4π  10−3 √ 2 σ Esmall = 4π(10−3)2σ Step 4: The total surface energy after the breakage is: Etotal = 125 × Esmall = 125 × 4π(10−3)2σ = 4π(10−3)2σ Step 5: The change in surface energy is: ∆E = Etotal −Eoriginal = 3.52 × 10−6 J Quick Tip The surface energy of a drop depends on its radius squared.
